nasb.text: For our fathers have been unfaithful and have done evil in the sight of the Lord our God, and have forsaken Him and turned their faces away from the dwelling place of the Lord, and have turned their backs.

esv.text: For our fathers have been unfaithful and have done what was evil in the sight of the Lord our God. They have forsaken him and have turned away their faces from the habitation of the Lord and turned their backs.

cnv.text: 我們的列祖冒犯了　神，行了耶和華我們的　神看為惡的事，離棄了他，轉臉不顧耶和華的居所，以背向他。

ccb.text: 我们的祖先行事不忠，做我们的上帝耶和华视为恶的事，背弃祂，转脸背向祂的居所。
